# integrationSlackWorkflowAccessUpdate

[Internal] Enables Linear Agent Slack workflow access for a Slack or Slack Asks integration.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`IntegrationPayload`](../objects/integration_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `enabled` | [`Boolean`](../scalars/boolean-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | Whether to enable workflow access. |
| `integrationId` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The ID of the integration to toggle workflow access for. |
